summary: PII — bulk re-classification job for historical data
description_md:
As a compliance-officer, I want to run a bulk re-classification job on historical data so that PII fields can be retroactively tagged according to updated retention policies.

## Background

Organizations frequently update their data classification policies, requiring historical records to be re-evaluated. Without an efficient bulk re-classification mechanism, compliance officers must manually review thousands of records, creating operational bottlenecks and increasing the risk of human error.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. The compliance officer can select a date range and execute a bulk re-classification job that processes all connector data sources within that range
2. The job applies updated PII auto-tagging rules to historical records and generates a summary report showing the count of records re-classified per data source
3. The system preserves the original classification in the audit log, enabling before/after comparison for each modified record
4. The bulk job supports pause, resume, and cancel operations, with progress tracked in the connector health monitor

comments.author: dev2@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Need to confirm the expected volume of historical records per tenant to size the batch processing correctly.
